Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class BooleanValidatorImpl

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator<S,Boolean>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractBooleanValidator<BooleanValidator>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.BooleanValidatorImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
BooleanValidator, ExtensibleBooleanValidator<BooleanValidator>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<BooleanValidator,Boolean>
public final class BooleanValidatorImpl extends AbstractBooleanValidator<BooleanValidator> implements BooleanValidator
Default implementation of BooleanValidator.

  • Constructor Details

    • BooleanValidatorImpl

      public BooleanValidatorImpl(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, Boolean actual, List<ValidationFailure> failures, boolean fatalFailure)
      Parameters:
      scope - the application configuration
      config - the instance configuration
      name - the name of the value
      actual - the actual value
      failures - the list of validation failures
      fatalFailure - true if validation stopped as the result of a fatal failure
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if scope, config, name or failures are null. If name is blank.
